Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: No bare spots anywhere- skied the red loop - a hard pack very well groomed base with an inch of  fresh on top. . Snow was granular , high moisture and a bit sticky for my wax , HF7 : but I bet others got it right . Bluebird day on a great trail !

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails are groomed and tracked and in good condition. Expect snow on the trails today as it will snow most of the day.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. The final day of night skiing is March 14.
nubsNob.comments: The snow started to fall around 5 a.m. this morning and it is accumulating on top of the corduroy. A steady snow is expected all day long with a solid breeze from the Northeast. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with food service and an espresso bar. The soup of the day is Clam Chowder. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. with an hour break at 4:30 p.m. to allow a groom for night skiing. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
